failure_time_density_mean.description: Mean (θ) of the exponential failure time distribution, used as the parameter in the density function f(t) = (1/9000) * e^(-t/9000).

warranty_end_time.description: Lower bound of the time interval (six months = 4380 hours), representing the end of the warranty period.

first_year_end_time.description: Upper bound of the time interval (one year = 8760 hours), representing the end of the first year.
